title: AXSchedulerAppointmentSegment
description: Represents a segment of an appointment that spans multiple days.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Interface representing an appointment segment with original appointment reference and segment dates.

data.content: interface AXSchedulerAppointmentSegment extends AXSchedulerAppointment { isContinuationFromPreviousDay: boolean; isContinuationToNextDay: boolean; originalStartDate: Date; originalEndDate: Date; originalAppointmentRef?: AXSchedulerAppointment; }

props.name: isContinuationFromPreviousDay
props.description: Whether this segment continues from the previous day.

props.name: isContinuationToNextDay
props.description: Whether this segment continues to the next day.

props.name: originalStartDate
props.description: Original start date of the appointment.

props.name: originalEndDate
props.description: Original end date of the appointment.
